function.outcome_justification: 10_entities/cast/sara.md defines Sara's canonical alias as `sara`. Project canonical records 40_projects/2026_05_02_harbor_body/README.MD and 40_projects/2026_05_03_reading_spine/README.MD each list `entity.sara` in linked_entities, so the exact project names are Harbor Body and Reading Spine.
